summary: Iteration 18 - Beat Mates New Features Testing. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). All new features verified: 1) Live session reviews (1-5 stars + optional comment), 2) Mock purchase endpoints for e-commerce, 3) Premium playlists with subscription. Frontend is React Native Expo - not testable via browser.

frontend_issues.note: Frontend is React Native Expo - cannot be tested via browser. User must test on mobile device via Expo Go.

critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/live-sessions/{session_id}/review - VERIFIED: Accepts rating 1-5 and optional text, validates session membership, updates average rating
POST /api/purchases/mock - VERIFIED: Creates mock purchase record (MOCKED - Stripe not integrated)
GET /api/music/playlists/premium - VERIFIED: Returns list of premium playlists with is_subscribed field per user
POST /api/music/playlists/{playlist_id}/subscribe - VERIFIED: Creates subscription (MOCKED - $10/month not actually charged)

success_rate.frontend: N/A (React Native Expo app - test on mobile device)

seed_data_creation: Test purchases and subscriptions created during testing (cleaned up via idempotent behavior)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 18 new features verified at backend API level. Key features: 1) Live session reviews with 1-5 star rating and optional text - both student and teacher can review each other after call ends, reviews update average_rating on user profile 2) Mock purchase system for video lessons (Stripe mockup) - /purchases/check and /purchases/mock endpoints working 3) Premium playlists with subscription - /music/playlists/premium lists premium playlists with is_subscribed per user, /subscribe creates subscription, /subscription checks status. MOCKED APIs: purchases/mock and playlists/{id}/subscribe are mocked (no real payment processing).

live_session_review.POST /api/live-sessions/{id}/review with: PASSED - Review created with rating and text

premium_playlists.GET /api/music/playlists/premium: PASSED - Returns list with is_subscribed field

mocked_api_note: POST /api/purchases/mock and POST /api/music/playlists/{id}/subscribe are MOCKED - no real Stripe integration or payment processing. These simulate what will happen when Stripe is integrated.
